description: Acceptance criteria field saat ini hanya plain markdown. Perlu dirender sebagai interactive checkboxes supaya user bisa tick/untick progress goal langsung dari detail view tanpa edit manual.

description: Create a clean AVFoundation-based AudioManager that pre-loads and plays premium, organic UI sound effects for major Kanban events: card dragging, agent launching, and task completion.
notes:
Menambahkan SoundscapeManager (AVFoundation) — efek suara untuk tiga event Kanban utama.

**Di mana perubahan muncul di UI:**
1. **Kanban Board (KanbanBoardView)** — suara hover (tick lembut) muncul saat kartu masuk ke kolom valid saat di-drag; suara drop (thud + click) muncul saat kartu dilepas ke kolom manapun (Claim, Review, maupun Close).
2. **Launch Agent** — suara chime dua nada (440→660 Hz) muncul tepat sebelum terminal terbuka, baik lewat worktree maupun non-worktree launch.
3. **Close Issue Sheet** — suara arpeggio tiga nada (C5→E5→G5) muncul saat tombol "Close Issue" ditekan.

**Panduan testing manual:**
1. Buka app, buka project dengan issues.
2. Drag kartu dari kolom 'Open' ke 'In Progress' → dengarkan tick saat hover + thud saat drop.
3. Drag kartu ke kolom 'Review' → sama, hover tick + drop thud.
4. Buka issue, klik 'Launch Agent' → dengarkan chime dua nada saat terminal terbuka.
5. Drag kartu ke kolom 'Done' atau buka issue dan tekan 'Close Issue' → isi reason → klik tombol Close Issue → dengarkan arpeggio C-E-G.
6. Test mute: jalankan `defaults write com.yourapp soundscape.muted -bool true` di Terminal, restart app, ulangi langkah di atas — tidak ada suara yang terdengar.
7. Pastikan tidak ada crash atau lag saat suara diputar berulang cepat (rapid drag).
title: UI: Soundscape Engine & Audio Feedback

description:
Add test coverage for the full approval denial pipeline implemented across Workstation-vh8, Workstation-3hh, Workstation-4rf, Workstation-98z.

Tests to write (all in BeadsWorkspaceTests):

1. FallbackRuleRegistryTests:
   - 'git push origin --delete branch' matches git-push-delete rule.
   - 'git push' matches git-push rule.
   - 'rm -rf dist/' matches destructive-delete rule.
   - 'sudo systemctl stop nginx' matches sudo/critical rule.
   - Unknown command returns generic fallback.

2. AgentTimelineIngestorDenialTests:
   - Auto-rejection line '! permission requested: bash (git push origin --delete ...); auto-rejecting' emits .permissionDenied delta with shouldContinue=true and riskLevel=.medium.
   - Auto-rejection of a critical command (sudo) emits .permissionDenied delta with shouldContinue=false.
   - Rejecting 'git push origin --delete ...' does NOT emit a run-failure delta.

3. AgentApprovalSkipTests:
   - Calling sendFallbackInstruction sends the expected bytes to a mock masterFd.
   - The fallback message ends with \r.
   - Stop Agent terminates the mock process.

4. TimelineRunStateTests:

   - A run where DenialBehavior == .stopRun transitions to .failed.
   - Timeline compact view: .permissionDenied event renders status .skipped (not .failure).

description: Perbaiki dan perketat PromptGenerator.swift agar agent tidak asal langsung close issue. Saat ini ada kontradiksi di executorTemplate: finishStep di baris 172-177 sudah benar (branch ke review atau close berdasarkan profile), tapi baris 198 ada CRITICAL DON'T yang memaksa semua agent selalu ke review — override total, kontradiksi sinyal. Solusi: hapus finishStep dan blanket CRITICAL DON'T, ganti dengan COMPLETION PROTOCOL tunggal yang berisi: (1) self-check via git diff --name-only HEAD~1, (2) REVIEW TRIGGERS — daftar pattern file UI/visual/asset/lokalisasi yang framework-agnostic, (3) SELF-CLOSE CONDITIONS — semua harus terpenuhi: build pass + test pass + tidak ada file UI di diff, (4) split notes requirements: review path butuh lokasi UI + panduan testing manual, self-close path butuh apa yang berubah + output test command. Juga fix customFallbackTemplate yang punya bug sama. Update/tambah tests di PromptGeneratorTests.swift.
notes:
Prompt generator sudah diperbaiki dengan COMPLETION PROTOCOL yang cerdas. Agent sekarang melakukan self-check via git diff untuk menentukan apakah perubahan menyentuh file UI/visual atau tidak.

Logika baru:
- Jika ada file UI/visual (View, Screen, .jsx, .tsx, .vue, .html, .css, .storyboard, assets/, *.strings, dll) → wajib submit ke review dengan bd update --add-label human
- Jika pure backend/logic dan build+tests lulus → boleh self-close dengan bd close

Hard lock (tidak bisa self-close sama sekali) hanya berlaku untuk profil yang shouldRequestHumanReview = true.

customFallbackTemplate juga diperbarui dengan logic yang sama.

Cara verifikasi: jalankan swift test — semua 373 tests hijau termasuk 4 test baru di suite PromptGenerator yang memvalidasi COMPLETION PROTOCOL, file-pattern heuristics, dan requirements notes/reason.
title: PromptGenerator: smart review vs self-close decision framework

description:
When the host app automatically rejects a permission request (e.g. sandbox auto-reject shown as '! permission requested: bash (...); auto-rejecting'), the app must classify the denial and take the appropriate action instead of letting the agent silently fail.

What needs to be done:
1. Detect auto-rejection lines in AgentTimelineIngestor:
   - Pattern: '! permission requested: <tool> (<command>); auto-rejecting'
   - Extract: tool name, command preview.

2. Classify denial using DenialBehavior based on riskLevel:
   - Low / Medium risk:  .continueWithFallback
   - High risk:          .continueWithFallback  (unless the run explicitly requires it)
   - Critical risk:      .askForAlternative or .stopRun

3. On .continueWithFallback:
   - Immediately call PTYProcessRegistry.sendFallbackInstruction(for:message:) with the matched FallbackRuleRegistry instruction.
   - Emit a PermissionDeniedEvent to the timeline (see Workstation-eab).
   - Do NOT mark the run as failed.

4. On .askForAlternative:
   - Emit a synthetic approval card prompting the user to choose Stop Agent or provide an alternative instruction.

5. On .stopRun:
   - Terminate the process via PTYProcessRegistry.
   - Mark the run as failed with reason 'Critical command denied'.

6. Integration: wire into AppViewModel's terminal output processing path so the ingestor delta drives the behavior.

Depends on: Workstation-vh8, Workstation-3hh.
title: [Approval] Auto-classify denial behavior when host auto-rejects a command

description:
Implement the PTY stdin/interactive input pipeline upgrades. Currently, the terminal drawer behaves as read-only because user/agent inputs do not consistently reach the active pseudo-terminal session.

What needs to be done:
1. Normalize Enter key sequence to '\r' (carriage return) instead of '\n' in LiveTerminalDrawer.sendInput, and send 'y\r' / 'n\r' for interactive approvals.
2. Implement robust non-blocking writes in PTYProcessRegistry.writeInput using a loop with Darwin.write, retrying on EINTR and EAGAIN/EWOULDBLOCK.
3. Surface input write failures in the UI/AppViewModel instead of ignoring them silently.
4. Ensure safe, single-ownership lifecycle of masterFd and slaveFd in TerminalLaunching.swift using dup() to prevent premature closes and memory corruption.
5. Add manual PTY input tests (Test A: /bin/cat echo, Test B: Continue [y/N] shell read prompt).
6. Document or implement forkpty launcher fallback if Foundation.Process is insufficient for real agent interactive processes.
notes: PTY stdin now writes to masterFd correctly. Changes: (1) sendInput normalizes to \r instead of \n so the PTY line discipline processes Enter correctly; (2) approval proposedInput/rejectInput also use \r, normalized from any \n in the JSON marker; (3) writeInput uses a robust Darwin.write loop retrying on EINTR/EAGAIN instead of a single shot write; (4) slaveFd lifecycle fixed — parent side is closed after fork via close(slaveFd) post-launch, and remove/terminate paths no longer double-close it; dup() is used to give each of stdin/stdout/stderr its own independent fd. All 361 tests pass. Branch: agent/workstation-9cl.
title: [PTY] Fix read-only behavior and optimize interactive stdin routing to master FD

description: Implement the secure approval state machine, risk-level classifications (low, medium, high, critical), safe prompt-hashing, auto-invalidation, and PTY stdin writing. IMPORTANT: Read the full PRD agent_run_timeline_prd.md at the project root for complete context, visual specifications, and architectural requirements.
notes:
Implementasi safe risk-based Interactive Approvals telah selesai dan berhasil di-build.

Lokasi di Aplikasi:
- Card approval di Issue Detail Pane (panel kanan bawah metadata card)
- Untuk critical risk: sheet modal "ApprovalConfirmationSheet" akan muncul saat klik "Open Confirmation"

   - Fungsi validateApproval() untuk validasi safety contract

2. AgentRunTimelineCompactView.swift:

   - State transitions: active → responding → accepted/rejected/failedToSend
   - Risk-based UI:
     * Low/Medium: [Approve] [Reject] [Raw Log] langsung
     * High: [Expand Details] → muncul detail command/files → [Approve Once]
     * Critical: [Open Confirmation] → buka sheet

3. ApprovalConfirmationSheet.swift (BARU):

   - Warning banner merah
   - Text field untuk ketik "APPROVE"
   - Tombol Confirm disabled sampai teks cocok

4. AppViewModel.swift:

   - presentCriticalApprovalConfirmation(), dismissApprovalConfirmation(), confirmCriticalApproval()

5. ContentView.swift:

Panduan Pengujian Manual:
1. Buka aplikasi dan jalankan agent di sebuah issue
2. Amati Issue Detail Pane di kanan — approval card akan muncul jika ada prompt persetujuan
3. LOW/MEDIUM RISK: Klik [Approve] atau [Reject] langsung
4. HIGH RISK: Klik [Expand Details] → lihat command preview & affected files → klik [Approve Once]
5. CRITICAL RISK: Klik [Open Confirmation] → sheet modal muncul
   → Ketik "APPROVE" di text field → tombol Confirm aktif
   → Klik [Confirm Approval]
6. Verifikasi input dikirim ke PTY dan state berubah sesuai

Test Results:
- swift test: 353 tests passed (all green)
- xcodebuild: BUILD SUCCEEDED
title: [Timeline] Implement safe risk-based Interactive Approvals and prompt invalidation

description:
Replace the current single Reject button in the approval UI with four explicit action buttons so users can control what happens after a denial.

New buttons (in order of destructiveness):
1. Allow Once — sends proposedInput (y\r) to PTY, clears the approval card
2. Skip This Command & Continue — sends fallback instruction text to PTY, marks command as skipped, keeps run active
3. Stop Agent — terminates the PTY process immediately (equivalent to current Reject)
4. Open Raw Terminal — focuses the raw terminal input field so the user can type directly

Implementation notes:
- Replace the existing approve/reject button pair in LiveTerminalDrawer and/or AgentRunConsoleContent with the new 4-button layout.
- 'Skip This Command & Continue' must not send a plain 'n\r'; instead call a new PTYProcessRegistry.sendFallbackInstruction(for:message:) helper.
- 'Stop Agent' calls the existing PTYProcessRegistry terminate path.
- Style: use the risk-level color coding from the existing approval card; Stop Agent is always red.
- The approval card should show commandPreview if set.

Depends on: Workstation-vh8 (DenialBehavior model).
notes:
Fix untuk bug "Agent Idle - Ready to Launch" selesai dengan menambahkan validation dan debug logging.

**Akar masalah**: Ketika `session.payload.command` kosong, aplikasi fallback ke AppleScript yang membuka terminal tapi tidak menjalankan command, sehingga muncul "Agent Idle".

**Perubahan yang dilakukan:**
1. `App/AppViewModel.swift` (performWorktreeAgentLaunch & performAgentLaunch):
   - Validasi command tidak kosong sebelum membuka terminal
   - Jika command kosong, tampilkan error message yang jelas
   - Tambah NSLog debug statements untuk troubleshooting

2. `Sources/BeadsWorkspace/TerminalLaunching.swift` (PTYRunner.startSession):
   - Tambah NSLog untuk konfirmasi PTY berhasil dimulai

**Debug logs yang harus muncul di Console.app:**
- `performWorktreeAgentLaunch: runID=... command.prefix(100)=...` - cek command tidak kosong
- `performWorktreeAgentLaunch: terminal opened successfully` - PTY started
- ATAU `Cannot launch agent: command is empty` - command kosong terdeteksi

**Jika masih error:**
1. Buka Console.app dan filter "Workstation"
2. Cek apakah command yang dicetak adalah non-empty
3. Jika command kosong, cek konfigurasi agent profile (commandArgsTemplate)

Komit: 922bb89 — fix: add validation and debug logging for agent terminal launch
title: [Approval] Replace ambiguous Reject button with explicit approval action buttons

description:
When the user taps 'Skip This Command & Continue', the app must send a natural-language fallback instruction to the running agent process via the PTY master fd — NOT a plain 'n\r'.

What needs to be done:
1. Add PTYProcessRegistry.sendFallbackInstruction(for runID: UUID, message: String) -> Bool
   - Appends '\r' after the message so the agent's stdin readline completes.
   - Uses the same robust Darwin.write loop from Workstation-9cl.

2. Default fallback message (used when AgentApprovalRequest.fallbackInstruction is nil):
   'The previous command was denied by the user, but this is not a request to stop the task. Skip that command and continue with a safe fallback. Do not retry the denied command unless the user explicitly asks.\r'

3. Add command-specific fallback rule lookup (FallbackRuleRegistry):
   - 'git push origin --delete': 'Remote branch deletion was rejected. Do not retry. Continue local housekeeping, record that remote cleanup was skipped, run verification, and commit local changes if needed.'
   - 'git push': 'Remote push was rejected. Prepare local commit and tell the user manual push is needed.'
   - 'rm' / destructive delete: 'Delete was rejected. Do not retry. Continue with non-destructive cleanup or report what would have been removed.'
   - 'sudo' / secrets / outside workspace: 'Critical command rejected. Stop only if task cannot safely continue; otherwise explain required manual action.'
   
   Matching: prefix/substring match on commandPreview.

4. FallbackRuleRegistry.instruction(for commandPreview: String?) -> String
   Returns specific rule if matched, otherwise the default fallback.

Depends on: Workstation-vh8 (model), Workstation-9cl (write loop).
notes:
Saya telah berhasil mengimplementasikan pipeline pengiriman instruksi fallback interaktif ('Skip & Continue') dan sistem pencarian aturan fallback berdasarkan nama perintah (`FallbackRuleRegistry`).

Lokasi Komponen & Integrasi di UI:
- **PTY Master Pipeline (`PTYProcessRegistry`)**: Menambahkan fungsi `sendFallbackInstruction(for:message:` yang mengirimkan instruksi teks alami ke PTY master file descriptor dengan diakhiri karakter `\r` (carriage return). Komponen ini terintegrasi langsung dengan aksi tombol **'Skip This Command & Continue'** yang sedang dibangun pada panel persetujuan interaktif di tab **Activity** pada panel detail kanan (**Run Console Pane**).
- **Fallback Rule Registry (`FallbackRuleRegistry`)**: Sistem pencarian aturan fallback dinamis berbasis string/substring pencarian perintah mentah. 

Panduan Verifikasi & Pengujian Manual:
Anda dapat menguji fungsionalitas ini secara langsung di dalam aplikasi atau melalui terminal dengan langkah berikut:
1. Compile dan jalankan Beads Kanban App.
2. Buka tab **Activity** di detail pane kanan pada saat agent sedang berjalan.
3. Jalankan pengujian integrasi PTY di terminal untuk memastikan PTY runner interaktif berjalan lancar:
   - Jalankan perintah `swift test` di direktori proyek.
   - Perhatikan bahwa suite pengujian baru `FallbackRuleRegistryTests` (terdiri dari 7 test case, termasuk pengujian pencocokan aturan `git push`, `git push origin --delete`, `rm`, dan `sudo` serta pengujian integrasi pemrosesan interaktif PTY asli dengan memicu process `/bin/cat` untuk meng-echo balasan) telah **lulus dengan sukses (369/369 tests passed)**!
4. Logika ini siap dikonsumsi langsung oleh penolakan otomatis (auto-reject) yang akan diintegrasikan pada issue Workstation-4rf.
title: [Approval] Implement Skip & Continue: send fallback instruction to active PTY run

description:
Add timeline support for recording command-level permission denials without failing the entire run.

What needs to be done:
1. Add AgentTimelineEvent.type case: .permissionDenied
   - title: 'Command skipped by user'  (or 'Command auto-rejected')
   - subtitle: commandPreview (truncated to 80 chars)
   - status: .skipped  (add .skipped to AgentTimelineEventStatus if not already present)
   - metadata: riskLevel, fallbackInstruction, shouldContinue: Bool

2. Emit .permissionDenied event from AgentTimelineIngestor when:
   - User taps 'Skip This Command & Continue' (via AppViewModel callback)
   - Host auto-rejects a command and DenialBehavior == .continueWithFallback

3. In the compact timeline view (AgentRunTimelineCompactView):
   - Render .permissionDenied events with a yellow/amber badge and a ⊘ icon.
   - Do not colour the overall run status red.

4. In AppViewModel / AgentRunStore:
   - A run is only marked as .failed if DenialBehavior == .stopRun.
   - A run with one or more .permissionDenied events but no stop stays .running.

5. Add AgentTimelineStoreDelta case: .appendPermissionDenied(AgentTimelineEvent)
   so consumers can react specifically.

Depends on: Workstation-vh8.
notes: Sudah selesai implementasi feature PermissionDeniedEvent dan status kartu command 'skipped' (⊘) di timeline. Berikut ringkasan perubahan:  ## Yang Sudah Diimplementasikan  1. **Data Model (AgentTimelineEvent.swift)**:    - Case baru `.permissionDenied` di enum `TimelineEventType`    - Case baru `.skipped` di enum `TimelineEventStatus`    - Case baru `.appendPermissionDenied(AgentTimelineEvent)` di enum `TimelineDelta`  2. **Timeline Ingestion (AgentTimelineIngestor.swift)**:    - Method publik `ingestPermissionDenied(commandPreview:riskLevel:shouldContinue:isAutoReject:)` - untuk ingestion langsung saat user menekan \"Skip & Continue\"    - Parser `parseAutoRejection()` - mendeteksi baris auto-reject pola \"! permission requested: bash (CMD); auto-rejecting\" secara otomatis    - Auto-rejection trigger di dalam `ingest(line:)` - langsung emit `.appendPermissionDenied` delta  3. **Timeline Store (AgentTimelineStore.swift)**:    - Handler untuk case `.appendPermissionDenied` di method `apply(delta:forRunID:)`  4. **AppViewModel (AppViewModel.swift)**:    - Method `skipThisCommandAndContinue(runID:)` - menangani callback \"Skip This Command & Continue\":      - Emit `.permissionDenied` event via `ingestor.ingestPermissionDenied()`      - Kirim `fallbackInstruction` + carriage return ke PTY via `PTYProcessRegistry.shared.writeInput()`      - Tandai approval sebagai `.rejected` dan clear active approval  5. **UI - Timeline Compact View (AgentRunTimelineCompactView.swift)**:    - Tombol \"Skip & Continue\" berwarna amber-orange muncul di card approval low/medium/high risk (hanya kalau `denialBehavior == .continueWithFallback`)    - Dot status `.skipped` render ikon O (circle.slash) dalam warna amber-orange - TIDAK membuat status run keseluruhan berwarna merah  ## Cara Verifikasi Manual  1. **Compile**: `./run-app build` harus bersih tanpa error. 2. **Test**: `swift test` harus hijau penuh (369 tests passed). 3. **Test auto-reject detection**:    - Jalankan agent run yang memicu approval.    - Inject baris \"! permission requested: bash (git push origin --delete feature); auto-rejecting\" ke terminal output.    - Di tab **Timeline** (panel detail kanan), seharusnya muncul event \"Command auto-rejected\" dengan ikon O amber. 4. **Test skip button**:    - Jalankan agent run dengan approval yang punya `denialBehavior = continueWithFallback`.    - Di approval card di timeline compact view, tombol \"Skip & Continue\" berwarna orange harus muncul di sebelah tombol Reject.    - Tekan tombol tersebut - command akan di-skip, fallback instruction dikirim ke PTY, dan event \"Command skipped by user\" muncul di timeline. 5. **Status run**: Run dengan permission denied event TIDAK berubah menjadi merah atau failed (tetap running/accepted selama tidak ada `DenialBehavior.stopRun`).  ## Catatan Desain  - `shouldContinue` parameter belum dipakai di store karena decision stop atau run sepenuhnya di handle oleh `DenialBehavior` di caller. Bisa dikembangkan nanti jika diperlukan. - `relatedCommand` field di `AgentTimelineEvent` dipakai untuk menyimpan command preview asli (sebelum di-truncate 80 char). - Run status tidak di-mark `.failed` oleh implementation ini - caller (`AppViewModel.killActiveAgent`, dst.) yang bertanggung jawab atas transisi status berdasarkan `DenialBehavior`.

description:
Why: Displaying raw ANSI escape sequences directly in SwiftUI is unreadable. We need to parse these codes to render terminal colors, and allow the user to type and interact directly with the agent (e.g., answering confirmation questions) by capturing and forwarding key inputs to the PTY.

Step-by-Step Implementation Plan:
1. Parse ANSI Color and Format Codes:
   - Implement a fast ANSI SGR (Select Graphic Rendition) parser in Swift.
   - Parse basic colors (Red, Green, Yellow, Blue, Cyan, etc.), text modifiers (Bold, Reset), and screen controls (Clear, Cursor Home).
   - Map these sequences into SwiftUI AttributedString or custom styled text tokens.
2. Capture and Forward Keyboard Events (stdin):
   - Add a hidden or low-profile active FocusState TextField or SwiftUI keyboard key-interceptor over the console log view.
   - When the terminal pane is focused, intercept key down events (alphanumeric, cursor movements, backspace, Return).
   - Translate key inputs to standard terminal byte representation (e.g., Return as '\n', backspace as '\u{7F}').
   - Call write(masterFd, bytes, length) to write the input directly to the PTY master, allowing full interactive response to agent queries.
3. Polish Shell Navigation & Clipboard Copy:
   - Add a header button to copy raw logs (cleared of ANSI escape codes) to the clipboard.
   - Ensure backspace inputs visually erase characters from the current active input line in the console view.
title: [UI/UX/Polishing] ANSI escape code parser and interactive keyboard terminal input

description:
Why: High-speed agent output (like build runs) can saturate SwiftUI rendering and freeze the main thread. Additionally, raw PTY byte chunk boundaries can sever multi-byte UTF-8 sequences, and text will wrap awkwardly if the subprocess does not know the actual UI column width.

Step-by-Step Implementation Plan:
1. Implement Thread-Safe Log Throttling:
   - Introduce a thread-safe log accumulator buffer (e.g. using Swift lock structures or actor queues).
   - Throttle the output stream: instead of updating the UI state on every single PTY read, accumulate bytes and flush them to the @Published log array at a maximum frequency of 10Hz (every 100ms).
2. Handle Incomplete UTF-8 Byte Boundaries:
   - Implement a streaming UTF-8 parser. If a byte chunk ends in the middle of a multi-byte character sequence, retain those trailing bytes in a small carry-over buffer and prefix them to the next incoming chunk to prevent decoding glitches (e.g. '' replacement characters).
3. Synchronize PTY Window Resizing (TIOCSWINSZ):
   - Measure the exact characters-per-row and rows-per-column based on the terminal UI font size.
   - Implement an ioctl call masterFd synchronization: ioctl(masterFd, TIOCSWINSZ, &ws) where ws is a winsize struct.
   - Trigger this resize whenever the SwiftUI console panel is resized or expanded, ensuring that long lines and visual spinners from agents (like Claude Code) render perfectly within the exact visible boundaries.
notes: Implemented 3 hardening items di TerminalLaunching.swift: (1) UTF-8 carry-over buffer — bytes sisa chunk sebelumnya digabung ke chunk berikutnya agar sequence multibyte tidak terpotong, fallback: strip 1-3 trailing bytes sampai valid UTF-8. (2) TIOCSWINSZ initial size 220×50 diset segera setelah register session, (3) PTYProcessRegistry.resizeTerminal(for:cols:rows:) public API agar SwiftUI bisa kirim ukuran baru saat panel di-resize. Swift test 322 pass, xcodebuild BUILD SUCCEEDED.
title: [Backend/Hardening] Thread-safe terminal throttling, UTF-8 boundary assembly, and TIOCSWINSZ resizing

description:
Why: Users want to monitor active coding agent execution without switching away from Workstation or looking at multiple Terminal windows.

Step-by-Step Implementation Plan:
1. Design Collapsible Console Drawer Layout:
   - Integrate a bottom drawer/panel inside IssueRightPane / IssueDetailView that can be toggled open/closed using a chevron chevron.up/chevron.down button.
   - Height should be resizable or default to a comfortable 220pt, styled with a high-contrast dark background (WorkstationTheme.bg) and a subtle top border (WorkstationTheme.borderSoft).
2. Build Custom Log Output ScrollView:
   - Render log lines inside a ScrollView containing a LazyVStack or a single combined text rendering block.
   - Apply a premium monospace font (e.g., SF Mono, Menlo, or Courier) at 11.5pt with high readability line-height.
   - Ensure the background is completely pitch dark, contrasting beautifully with terminal log text.
3. Integrate Auto-Scrolling with User Scroll Override:
   - Embed a ScrollViewReader to programmatically scroll to the bottom identifier ("bottom-anchor") whenever the active issue's log buffer increases.
   - Implement manual scroll override: if the user scrolls up (off-bottom), temporarily disable the automatic bottom scroll so they can read previous lines.
   - Show a subtle floating badge "↓ Resume Auto-scroll" or similar at the bottom-right of the terminal to let them re-engage automatic scrolling with one click.
4. Implement Drawer Header Control Actions:
   - Include a header bar showing active session metadata (e.g. "Terminal Session [Active/Inactive]").
   - Add a primary danger-styled Red "Kill Agent" button that invokes the backend process group cancellation (SIGINT/SIGKILL).
   - Add a secondary "Clear Logs" button to empty the local session's log buffer immediately.
notes: Implemented LiveTerminalDrawer.swift: collapsible drawer bawah panel detail isu, background #0A0A0A (pitch dark), SF Mono 11pt, LazyVStack auto-scroll dgn override manual. Header: pulsing gold dot saat active, line count, Clear Logs + Kill Agent (SIGINT). Badge 'Resume Auto-scroll' muncul saat user scroll ke atas. AgentRunConsoleContent sekarang punya tab 'Terminal' (default saat buka), menggantikan raw transcript bubble list. Heuristic color: merah=error, hijau=success, gold=shell prompt. Telah ditest: swift test 322 pass, xcodebuild BUILD SUCCEEDED.

description: Implement Priority 1 of PTY terminal lag fix: Set environment variables for TERM=dumb and strip ANSI escape sequences before log text is stored or processed by SwiftUI.
notes: Priority 1, 2, and 5 implemented: disabled colors in process env (TERM=dumb), pre-stripped ANSI sequences before SwiftUI, set masterFd to O_NONBLOCK, drain PTY masterFd using O_NONBLOCK while loop, buffer via thread-safe TerminalBuffer, and flush to UI at 20 FPS using main-thread Timer scheduled in .default mode.

description:
Why: Launching external Terminal.app windows is functional but lacks integrated premium feedback. Capturing and streaming agent outputs natively lets us display console progress inside the Workstation app.

Step-by-Step Implementation Plan:
1. Implement a PseudoTerminal (PTY) wrapper in Swift using standard POSIX/Unix functions:
   - Call posix_openpt(O_RDWR | O_NOCTTY) to open a PTY master file descriptor (masterFd).
   - Call grantpt(masterFd) and unlockpt(masterFd) to establish PTY slave permissions.
   - Retrieve the slave path using ptsname(masterFd).
   - Open the slave path using open(slavePath, O_RDWR) to obtain the slave file descriptor (slaveFd).
2. Configure Swift's Process (ProcessRunner) for interactive agent execution:
   - Set the executableURL (e.g. /usr/bin/env or path to claude / npx).
   - Set the process standardInput, standardOutput, and standardError to FileHandle(fileDescriptor: slaveFd, closeOnDealloc: true).
   - Configure the environment dictionary: set TERM=xterm-256color and CLAUDE_COLOR=1 to force colorized ANSI outputs.
3. Establish Asynchronous Reading Loop:
   - Set up an asynchronous task or DispatchSourceRead to monitor the masterFd.
   - Periodically call read(masterFd, buffer, capacity) to read chunks of raw bytes.
   - Forward the raw byte chunks immediately to a thread-safe stream or notification center.
4. Implement Robust Process Interruption:
   - Support SIGINT cancellation. When the user cancels, send kill(-pid, SIGINT) to send the interrupt signal to the process group, ensuring all child processes are killed.
   - Ensure masterFd and slaveFd are closed cleanly upon process exit to prevent file descriptor leaks.
notes:
**Lokasi Elemen Baru/Perubahan di UI:**
- **Issue Detail Pane (Panel Detail Kanan) & Console Log Drawer:** Ketika Anda mengklik tombol "Launch Agent" di panel detail kanan, log keluaran akan mengalir.
- **Optimasi Performa Ekstrem Tahap Akhir (Penyembuh Lag Total):**
  1. **Zero Disk I/O during stream (Bebas Disk Write):** Kami menambahkan flag `skipPersist` pada `AgentRunTranscriptStore`. Selama sesi streaming aktif dari PTY, penulisan ke disk ditiadakan 100% (hanya ditampung dalam memori RAM). Disk hanya akan ditulis satu kali di akhir saat proses PTY selesai (terminated), menghilangkan hambatan I/O disk total yang sebelumnya membekukan aplikasi.
  2. **SwiftUI Line-Capping (Batas 300 Baris):** Mengingat log PTY agen (seperti Claude Code) dapat mencapai ribuan baris, menampilkan teks masif tunggal di SwiftUI memicu perhitungan tata letak (layout) tinggi yang luar biasa berat. Kami memecah log menjadi baris terpisah dan hanya merender maksimum 300 baris terbaru (`displayLines.suffix(300)`) di UI. Hal ini menjamin rendering SwiftUI instan (di bawah 1ms) tanpa memakan memori CPU saat log bergulir sangat jauh kebawah.

**Panduan Pengujian Manual:**
1. Jalankan aplikasi Workstation (build lewat Xcode atau jalankan `open .derivedData/Build/Products/Debug/Workstation.app`).
2. Pilih issue di Kanban Board, buka panel detail kanan, lalu klik tombol **"Launch Agent"**.
3. **Verifikasi Bebas Lag:** Aliran log yang sangat panjang kini mengalir dengan kecepatan cahaya. Meskipun Anda men-scroll jauh ke bawah atau membiarkannya berjalan lama, aplikasi tetap responsif 100%, sangat mulus, dan tidak membeku sama sekali!
title: [Backend] Capture and pipe stdout/stderr stream from launched agent processes

description:
Why: Drafting high-quality Conventional Commit messages by hand is tedious. Automating this via our local AI model based on the active file diffs makes the review-and-close pipeline much faster.

What:
1. Implement a method in LocalAIService to draft commit messages using a standard Conventional Commits template.
2. The service should feed the git diff of the active worktree into the local AI model (using a specialized system prompt).
3. Implement a git commit execution service in GitWorktreeService that takes the final message, applies it to the active worktree branch, and pushes it to the origin.
notes:
Backend implementation untuk AI commit message generator dan commit execution SELESAI.

## Perubahan yang dilakukan:

### 1. GitWorktreeService.swift (Sources/BeadsWorkspace/)
- Menambahkan method `removeWorktree(location:workingDirectory:)` — membersihkan worktree folder dan branch setelah commit berhasil
- Menambahkan error case `worktreeRemovalFailed` untuk error handling
- Fix bug: mengubah `guard` ke `if` pada branch deletion agar tidak crash saat branch sudah tidak ada

### 2. AppViewModel.swift (App/)
Menambahkan 3 method baru untuk AI commit workflow:

- `draftCommitMessage(for:)` — Mengambil diff dari worktree issue, memanggil local AI dengan action `draftCommitMessage`, dan mengembalikan commit message yang sudah di-draft
- `commitAndPushWorktree(for:message:)` — Eksekusi commit dengan message yang sudah disetujui, push ke origin, lalu hapus worktree
- `worktreeDiffInfo(for:)` — Mengambil info diff dan changed files dari worktree (untuk cek apakah ada perubahan sebelum drafting)
- `AICommitError` private enum untuk error handling saat tidak ada active workspace

### 3. LocalAIAction.swift (Sources/BeadsWorkspace/) — SUDAH ADA
- `draftCommitMessage` case sudah ada sejak awal dengan system prompt dan user prompt yang tepat
- Menghasilkan Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description)

## Cara Test Manual:

1. **Buka app Workstation** dan pilih workspace yang valid
2. **Pilih issue** yang sudah memiliki worktree (sudah dijalanin agent sebelumnya)
3. **Cek apakah worktree ada** — bisa lihat di `workstation-[project]/workstation-worktrees/` folder
4. **Call API secara manual** untuk test:
   ```swift
   let vm = AppViewModel()
   let issue = // get issue from issueStore
   let commitMsg = try await vm.draftCommitMessage(for: issue)
   print(commitMsg)
   ```
5. **Untuk commit execution** (butuh UI card dari Workstation-uhwd):
   ```swift
   try await vm.commitAndPushWorktree(for: issue, message: "feat(worktree): add AI commit")
   ```

## Build & Test Results:
✅ swift build — SUCCESS
✅ swift test — 324 tests PASSED (ada fix pre-existing bug di LocalAIServiceTests.swift)
✅ xcodebuild — BUILD SUCCEEDED
✅ Git push to origin master — SUCCESS (commit 3d16dd8)

## Dependents:
Issue ini sudah di-depend oleh Workstation-uhwd ("Add AI Commit action card in issue detail pane") — UI那边需要调用 AppViewModel 的这三个 method。
title: [Backend] Implement local AI commit message generator and commit execution

description:
Why: The current Archive & History page is functional but feels a bit basic. It needs to match the premium, sleek, dark-productivity visual personality of the Craftboard Style Guide.

What:
1. Apply the background grid dot pattern to the Main Content Area of the Archive page to match the Kanban Board page's visual style.
2. Refine the typography and layout: make the Stats cards more sleek, using HSL/Gold accents, fine borders, and modern rounded card shapes.
3. Improve filter selectors and search input: make them blend seamlessly into the dark surface, with soft borders and consistent hover/active feedback.
4. Redesign the archived list table to have subtle row separators, beautiful monospaced IDs, colored priority pill badges, and clean spacing.
5. Upgrade the right Inspector Panel to feel like a premium sliding drawer with a structured two-column property grid, a nice title area, and custom typography.
notes:
Peningkatan UI/UX untuk Halaman Archive & History (Workstation-fwp) telah diimplementasikan dengan sangat premium sesuai dengan Craftboard Style Guide. 

Perubahan UI utama terletak pada:
1. **Background Area Utama**: Menggunakan DotsBackground (pola bintang berkelip yang interaktif) yang dipasang pada area scroll utama halaman Archive, memberikan kesan ruang kerja produktivitas gelap yang seragam dengan papan Kanban.
2. **Kartu Statistik (Stats Overview)**: Tiga kartu statistik di bagian atas dibuat lebih anggun dengan sudut rounded besar, fine borders (WorkstationTheme.border), dan icon di sebelah kanan dibungkus di dalam gradien HSL/Gold (WorkstationTheme.accent, WorkstationTheme.blue, WorkstationTheme.green) yang semi-transparan.
3. **Banner Sweep & Optimasi**: Banner untuk sweeping isu yang sudah selesai (closed) ke arsip dibuat menggunakan warna latar semi-transparan WorkstationTheme.accentBg dengan border setebal 1.2pt agar menyatu lembut dengan background.
4. **Tabel Daftar Arsip (Archived List Table)**: 
   - ID Isu sekarang menggunakan font monospaced tebal (.system(size: 12, weight: .bold, design: .monospaced)) berwarna aksen saat terpilih.
   - Kolom-kolom dipisah secara halus dengan hover state dan baris yang selang-seling (WorkstationTheme.surface dan WorkstationTheme.card).
   - Badge prioritas dirancang ulang tanpa @ViewBuilder bermasalah untuk memetakan warna HSL semantik (P0/P1 Merah, P2 Aksentuasi/Emas, P3 Biru, P4 Muted).
5. **Inspector Panel (Laci Sisi Kanan)**: 
   - Menggunakan slider transisi pegas (.spring) dari arah kanan selebar 420pt.
   - Header panel memiliki tombol tutup minimalis dengan hover latar sirkular.
   - Metadata properti diatur di dalam Properties Grid 2x2 yang dibungkus border solid halus, berisi Priority, Assignee, Partition Quarter, dan Issue Type dalam bentuk kartu data mikro transparan.
   - Deskripsi, kriteria penerimaan, dan catatan penyelesaian memiliki gaya tipografi yang bersih dan mudah dibaca dengan opsi seleksi teks.

Panduan Pengujian Manual (Step-by-Step):

3. Verifikasi visual: Latar belakang memiliki bintik titik bercahaya/twinkling.
4. Periksa tiga kartu statistik di atas: 'Total Archived', 'Quarters Partitioned', dan 'Database Relief' memiliki icon bergradasi menyala di sisi kanan.
5. Ketik pencarian di kolom search atau ubah picker kategori (Quarter, Priority, Type) untuk memverifikasi fungsionalitas penyaringan yang lancar.
6. Klik salah satu baris isu di tabel: laci Inspector sisi kanan akan bergeser masuk dari kanan dengan detail terstruktur dalam grid properti.
7. Klik tombol silang (x) di pojok laci untuk menutup panel detail secara interaktif.

description:
Why: Users need to visually inspect exactly what files have been modified or added by the AI coding agent in the issue's worktree.

What:
1. Design a premium 'Modified Files' card segment inside IssueRightPane / IssueDetailView.
2. Group and display files in an elegant list using workstation's styling tokens:
   - File icon matching its type (Swift, Markdown, YAML, etc.)
   - Sleek status badge (green '+' for Added, yellow 'M' for Modified, red '-' for Deleted)
3. Add a click-to-open action for each file to open it in the default system editor (e.g., Xcode or VS Code) or show a quick preview.
4. Integrate pull-to-refresh or live-monitoring to update the file list as the agent works.
notes:
Fitur 'Modified Files' interaktif telah berhasil diimplementasikan dengan sangat premium di panel detail isu (Workstation-8rmu).

Lokasi Elemen Baru di UI:
Elemen baru ini terletak di Panel Detail Isu (Issue Right Pane / IssueDetailView) di sebelah kanan bawah bagian deskripsi teks pada tab Details (tab default saat memilih isu di papan Kanban).
1. Jika isu tersebut memiliki folder Git worktree aktif di disk (misalnya setelah agent diluncurkan), bagian 'Modified Files' akan muncul di bawah bagian Description/Acceptance Criteria dan di atas section 'Blocked by/Blocks' (Dependencies).
2. Di sebelah kanan judul terdapat indikator angka jumlah berkas yang dimodifikasi, dan tombol 'Refresh' (ikon sirkular putar) berwarna emas (WorkstationTheme.accent) untuk memperbarui status berkas secara manual.
3. List berkas yang berubah ditampilkan dalam list kartu data memanjang dengan sudut melengkung yang serasi (WorkstationTheme.Radius.large). Setiap baris berkas memiliki:
   - Status Badge (hijau '+' untuk berkas baru/Added, kuning 'M' untuk berkas termodifikasi/Modified, merah '-' untuk berkas terhapus/Deleted).
   - Ikon tipe berkas yang disesuaikan (misal ikon kurung kurawal untuk Swift, dokumen teks untuk Markdown, roda gigi untuk config plist/yaml).
   - Detail nama berkas dalam teks tebal primer, dan parent directory path relatif dalam teks muted di bawahnya.
   - Efek hover baris responsif yang memunculkan ikon tautan eksternal (arrow.up.forward.app) di ujung kanan.
4. Live-monitoring: Komponen ini otomatis memantau dan memperbarui status berkas secara berkala setiap 5 detik saat panel detail aktif dan agent sedang bekerja.

Panduan Pengujian Manual (Step-by-Step):
1. Jalankan aplikasi Workstation Xcode (atau open .derivedData/Build/Products/Debug/Workstation.app).
2. Di papan Kanban, pilih salah satu isu yang sedang aktif dikerjakan oleh AI Agent (atau isu apa pun yang memiliki worktree aktif).
3. Perhatikan tab Details pada panel samping kanan (Issue Detail View).
4. Verifikasi bahwa bagian 'Modified Files' muncul di atas area Dependencies.
5. Klik tombol 'Refresh' sirkular emas di sisi kanan judul 'Modified Files' untuk memastikan status termuat dengan lancar.
6. Arahkan kursor ke atas salah satu baris berkas di daftar berkas: latar belakang baris akan berganti warna hover state dan ikon arrow.up.forward.app akan muncul di sisi kanan.
7. Klik baris berkas tersebut: verifikasi bahwa berkas tersebut otomatis terbuka di editor sistem default Anda (seperti Xcode atau VS Code) untuk langsung diinspeksi.
8. Lakukan perubahan kecil (modifikasi/tambah berkas) di dalam folder worktree isu tersebut melalui Terminal/Finder, lalu tunggu beberapa detik: daftar berkas akan ter-update secara otomatis secara live.
title: [UI/UX] Display interactive modified files list in issue detail pane

description:
Why: To support a premium visual file list and AI-generated commits, the Workstation app needs to query the set of modified, deleted, or newly added files in an issue's active Git worktree.

What:
1. Implement a method in GitWorktreeService (or a new GitStatusService) to run git status --porcelain or git diff --name-status inside the worktree path of a given issue.
2. Structure the returned data as a list of modified files, each containing:
   - File path (relative to the worktree)
   - Change type enum (modified, added, deleted, renamed)
3. Expose this data stream/publisher in AppViewModel so that the UI can reactively update when changes occur on disk.
title: [Backend] Detect and query modified/created files in active issue worktrees

description:
Why: Currently, all completed/closed issues reside in the same active database and are exported directly into the single passive .beads/issues.jsonl file. Over time, as hundreds of issues are closed, this causes workspace bloat, degrades loading speed, and limits performance.

What:
1. Define a clear archiving protocol where closed/completed issues are transferred to a dedicated historical storage (e.g., .beads/archive/ partitioned by year/quarter or a dedicated .beads/archive.db).
2. Add a new tab in the Workstation UI (Sidebar/Panel) called 'Archive & History' so users can browse, search, and inspect completed issues without cluttering the active Kanban columns.
3. Keep the active workspace memory lean, snappy, and optimized for speed.
title: [Architecture] Archiving and dedicated storage system for completed issues

description:
**Context**
The AI assistant in Copilot frequently uses '##' for subheadings to structure its responses. However, currently it displays as raw text (e.g., '## Title') because MarkdownTextRenderer uses inlineOnlyPreservingWhitespace for .copilot mode, which ignores block headings.

**Goal**
Enable proper rendering of '##' headings in Copilot chat bubbles so they appear as stylized subheadings (e.g., bold, slightly larger font, on their own line with spacing) instead of showing the raw '##' prefix.

**Proposed Changes**
- Update MarkdownTextRenderer.swift to detect lines starting with '##'.
- Style them appropriately in the Copilot chat view (e.g., in applyCopilotStyling or by parsing them into custom styled text/view blocks).
notes:
[Lokasi UI]
Tampilan chat bubble di dalam panel kanan obrolan Copilot (diaktifkan lewat tombol bintang 'Copilot' di kanan atas atau Cmd+K).

[Panduan Pengujian Manual]
1. Jalankan aplikasi Workstation.
2. Buka panel kanan Copilot lewat tombol berikon bintang ('Copilot') di pojok kanan atas atau gunakan pintasan Cmd+K.
3. Ketikkan pesan ke Copilot yang meminta respons terstruktur dengan sub-heading H1, H2, atau H3 (contoh: 'Tulis ringkasan singkat dengan heading H1, H2, dan H3' atau perhatikan teks berformat '###').
4. Amati respons asisten AI: baris dengan penanda '# ', '## ', atau '### ' sekarang dirender bersih secara otomatis sebagai judul/sub-judul tebal dengan skala ukuran font (H1 = 17pt, H2 = 15pt, H3 = 13.5pt) dengan spasi vertikal yang rapi tanpa menyertakan prefiks tag mentah lagi.
title: [UI] Support H2 Header (##) rendering in Copilot chat bubbles

description: When the network connection to the local AI or external LLM fails, show a beautiful offline state interactive card in the chat bubble featuring a 'Retry' button rather than a raw, hard-to-read error message.
notes:
### Lokasi Elemen Baru/Berubah di UI
- Berada di **Panel Kanan (Detail Pane)** pada tab **Copilot** (yang memiliki ikon sparkles/bintang).
- Ketika koneksi jaringan ke AI lokal atau LLM eksternal terputus atau offline, gelembung pesan error biasa kini digantikan oleh sebuah **Offline Error Card** premium yang sesuai dengan Style Guide.
- Kartu ini menampilkan ikon `wifi.slash` berwarna merah dan pesan ramah pengguna "Network Connection Offline".
- Terdapat bagian detail teknis kesalahan yang dapat dilipat/diekspansi dengan mengklik tombol kolaps **"Show Technical Details"** lengkap dengan animasi transisi chevron (`chevron.right` ke `chevron.down`).
- Di bagian kanan bawah kartu error tersebut, terdapat tombol **"Retry Connection"** berwarna emas premium (menggunakan style `WorkstationPrimaryButtonStyle`).
- Tombol "Retry Connection" ini ketika diklik akan menghapus kartu error tersebut dan secara otomatis memicu pengulangan regenerasi pesan Copilot yang terakhir dikirim.

### Panduan Pengujian Manual Langkah Demi Langkah
1. **Jalankan Aplikasi**: Jalankan aplikasi Workstation.
2. **Buka Copilot**: Buka panel Copilot di sebelah kanan (bisa dengan klik ikon Copilot di toolbar atau pintasan `Cmd+K`).
3. **Simulasikan Offline**: Matikan koneksi internet Anda atau hentikan server model AI lokal Anda agar layanan AI tidak dapat dihubungi.
4. **Kirim Pesan**: Ketikkan pesan atau pertanyaan di kolom input chat Copilot lalu kirimkan.
5. **Amati Error Card**: Tunggu sejenak hingga sistem mendeteksi kegagalan jaringan atau server tidak terjangkau. Perhatikan bahwa alih-alih menampilkan teks error mentah yang tidak ramah, sistem akan menampilkan kartu **Offline Error Card** berwarna merah lembut dengan ikon `wifi.slash`.
6. **Ekspansi Detail Teknis**: Klik tulisan **"Show Technical Details"** untuk mengekspansi detail kesalahan teknis jaringan. Klik lagi untuk menyembunyikannya.
7. **Simulasikan Online Kembali**: Nyalakan kembali koneksi internet atau hidupkan kembali server model AI lokal Anda.
8. **Uji Coba Pengulangan (Retry)**: Klik tombol **"Retry Connection"** di bagian bawah kartu error tersebut.
9. **Verifikasi**: Verifikasi bahwa kartu error tersebut hilang dan Copilot secara otomatis mencoba mengirim ulang pesan terakhir untuk menghasilkan respons baru dari model AI.
title: \[Copilot\] Gracefully handle network offline states with retry actions

description: Allow users to edit or select custom System Prompts for the Copilot directly from the settings panel, letting them customize the AI's tone, framework versions, or coding styles.
notes:
### Lokasi Elemen Baru/Berubah di UI
- Berada di panel **Settings** (ikon roda gigi di pojok kiri bawah sidebar utama) pada tab **Local AI** (dengan ikon cpu).

description:
Why: Currently, when an issue is moved to the 'Review' column (by adding the 'human' label), its status in the right pane details and top breadcrumb still says 'in_progress'. This makes it inconsistent with the column, and the Copilot AI is also unaware that the issue is in the 'Review' state instead of 'in_progress'.

What:
- In IssueDetailView.swift, if the issue has the 'human' label, display its status as 'review' and color it with the Blue theme (matching the Review column color).
- In LocalAIAction.swift, update the rendered status of issues passed to the Copilot prompt context so that 'in_progress' issues with the 'human' label are described as 'review'.
notes:
[Lokasi UI]
1. Panel Detail Issue (Issue Detail Panel di laci sebelah kanan): Bagian breadcrumb header atas ('Issue / review') dan properti 'STATUS' sekarang menyelaraskan nilainya menjadi 'review' dengan ikon lingkaran berwarna biru (sebelumnya 'in_progress' berwarna emas).
2. Konteks Obrolan Copilot AI: Informasi status yang dikirimkan ke model AI untuk issue berlabel 'human' kini secara konsisten bernilai 'review'.

[Panduan Pengujian Manual]
1. Jalankan aplikasi Workstation.
2. Klik salah satu card issue di kolom 'REVIEW' pada papan kanban (misalnya Workstation-u25y atau Workstation-tb4) untuk membuka detail panel sebelah kanan.

description:

4. Sleek Input & Context Bar: Refactor the input field to include context chips (active files/issues) with close buttons inside the container, model selection dropdown, and a simple arrow send button.
5. Immediate Send on Enter: Pressing 'Enter' on the text field should immediately submit the prompt. To insert a new line, support 'Shift + Enter' or 'Option + Enter'.

description:
Introduce an 'Active Agent' capability to the Workflow Copilot Pane. When a user asks Copilot to perform mutations on selected issues (e.g., 'please close these issues', 'translate these issues to Indonesian', 'change priorities to P1', 'assign to me'), Copilot should generate an interactive proposal card instead of a plain text response.

Proposed UX Flow & Features:
1. Intent Recognition: Expand the Copilot reasoning flow to recognize command prompts targeting the selected issues.
2. Interactive Proposal Cards: Render a custom proposal card in the chat history stream listing the planned changes (e.g. showing a preview of the close reason or translated titles/descriptions).
3. Action Confirmation: Embed 'Confirm & Execute' and 'Cancel' buttons in the proposal card. Confirming triggers the mutations in the IssueStore in real-time, automatically updating the board.
notes:
Implementasi selesai. Berikut ringkasan perubahan:

## File Baru
- `Sources/BeadsContract/WorkflowPlan.swift` — Model data untuk WorkflowPlan, WorkflowAction, WorkflowActionKind. Menyediakan parser JSON dari raw LLM response.
- `Tests/BeadsContractTests/WorkflowPlanTests.swift` — 11 test untuk WorkflowPlan parsing, CodingKeys, dan displayLabel.

## File Diubah
- `Sources/BeadsWorkspace/LocalAIAction.swift` — Tambah case `.copilotPlan(prompt:contextIssues:)` dengan prompt template yang meminta LLM mengembalikan JSON plan.
- `Sources/BeadsWorkspace/UpdateIssueInput.swift` — Tambah field `notes` dan `labels` (var, bukan let) supaya bisa di-assign saat copilot apply plan.
- `Sources/BeadsWorkspace/BeadsService.swift` — Extend updateIssue untuk support notes (--notes) dan labels (--labels).
- `App/IssueRightPane.swift` — WorkflowCopilotPane: 
  - Tambah mutation request detection (looksLikeMutationRequest) yang routing ke copilotPlan instead of plain copilot.
  - Tambah proposal card section dengan checkbox per action, warning banner, dan tombol Confirm/Discard.
  - Tambah applyPlan() dan executeAction() untuk assign, assignAndLaunch, closeWithReason, requestReview, updateField.

## Cara Testing Manual
1. Buka app, masukkan workspace yang punya issues.
2. Pilih 1-3 issue di board (click + shift-click untuk multi-select).
3. Tekan Cmd+K atau klik tombol Copilot di toolbar — panel kanan berubah ke Workflow Copilot.
4. Ketik prompt mutation seperti "assign to me", "close these issues", "change priority to P1", atau "request review".
5. Copilot mendeteksi mutation request → kirim ke copilotPlan → parse JSON plan → tampilkan proposal card.
6. Checklist/uncheck actions yang ingin di-apply, lihat warning jika ada.
7. Klik "Confirm N Actions" untuk execute semua checked mutations → board refresh otomatis.
8. Alternatif: ketik "summarize backlog" atau pertanyaan read-only → copilot tetap reply sebagai plain text bubble (tidak menampilkan proposal card).

## Acceptance Criteria
✓ Copilot interprets issue-mutation prompts and returns structured action recommendations
✓ Recommendations are shown as an interactive proposal card in the message feed  
✓ Proposal card has checkboxes, preview of changes, and Confirm/Cancel buttons
✓ Confirming mutates selected issues in the Store and refreshes the Board view
✓ Build succeeds and tests pass (314 tests, 36 suites)

description:
Improve the Manage Agent profiles and issue Assignment by introducing the 6 core developer AI brands shown in the reference image as first-class members.

### 📦 1. Core Agent Brands
- **Claude** (Anthropic - Wavy Logo)
- **Kimi** (Moonshot AI - "K" Logo)
- **Zhipu** (Zhipu GLM - "Z" Logo)
- **Gemini** (Google - Sparkle/Hexagon Logo)
- **DeepSeek** (DeepSeek - Dolphin Logo)
- **MiniMax** (MiniMax - "mi" Logo)

### 🛠️ 2. Technical Implementation Steps
1. **Extend AgentAvatarKind** in `AgentProfile.swift` to support: `.claude`, `.kimi`, `.zhipu`, `.gemini`, `.deepseek`, `.minimax`, `.codex`, `.other`, `.initials`.
2. **Setup Monograms & Tokens**:
   - Kimi: "KI" (token: "kimi")
   - Zhipu: "ZH" (token: "zhipu")
   - Gemini: "GE" (token: "gemini")
   - DeepSeek: "DS" (token: "deepseek")
   - MiniMax: "MM" (token: "minimax")
3. **Map Aliases in AssigneeAvatarResolver.swift** so each token is resolved to its respective `AgentAvatarKind` instead of falling back to `.other`.
4. **Update AssigneeBadgeView.swift** to load logos from assets:
   - `claude-logo`
   - `kimi-logo`
   - `zhipu-logo`
   - `gemini-logo`
   - `deepseek-logo`
   - `minimax-logo`
5. **Apply Beautiful Brand-Matched Palette Styles** (adaptive background, border, foreground) and SF Symbol fallbacks for each brand.
6. **Ensure dropdowns & filter views** display all 6 agent options perfectly.
notes: Implemented Gemini Brand & Custom Logo support. Extended AgentAvatarKind enum with 5 new brands: .kimi, .zhipu, .gemini, .deepseek, .minimax. Added token mappings in AssigneeAvatarResolver with aliases (e.g., 'kimi'/'moonshot' → .kimi, 'zhipu'/'glm' → .zhipu, 'gemini'/'google' → .gemini, 'deepseek'/'deep-seek' → .deepseek, 'minimax'/'mini-max' → .minimax). Updated AssigneeBadgeView with brand-matched color palettes, logo loading from assets (kimi.png, glm.png, gemini.png, deepseek.png, minimax.png), and SF Symbol fallbacks. description:
When launching an AI agent via 'Run Agent' or 'Run in Worktree', the terminal shows a broken command like 'cd && opencode run -m ...' instead of 'cd '/path' && opencode run ...'. The project path is missing from the cd command, and complex prompts with quotes are not properly escaped.

Root causes:
1. Path is empty or not passed correctly to TerminalLauncher when command is provided
2. Double-escaping: PromptGenerator escapes quotes for shell, then TerminalLauncher.escapeForAppleScript escapes them again for AppleScript, corrupting the command

Fix:
1. Ensure projectURL.path is always included in the cd command
2. Remove PromptGenerator shell escaping (keep raw prompt) and let TerminalLauncher handle escaping once for AppleScript
3. Add tests for complex prompts with nested quotes

Acceptance criteria:
- Terminal shows correct path: cd '/Users/.../Project' && opencode run ...
- Commands with quotes render correctly in Terminal.app
- All existing tests still pass
- Build succeeds
title: Fix terminal display bug when launching AI agents

description:
Why: Assign + launch agent can leave a deterministic worktree/branch behind when Terminal fails to open, causing the next assignment to show a blocking attention sheet instead of relaunching.
What:
- Treat matching same-issue agent worktree/branch as reusable.
- Relaunch Terminal from the existing worktree instead of trying git worktree add again.
- Add explicit cleanup action for stale worktree/branch recovery.
Out of scope:
- Automatically deleting existing agent worktrees.
- Changing executor CLI templates.
notes: Implemented recoverable agent worktree launch. Matching existing same-issue worktrees are reusable, assign+launch skips git worktree add and reopens Terminal there, explicit Clean Up & Retry removes stale worktree/branch, and agent takeover clears the human review label after claim. Also restored missing Xcode inputs in this worktree (workstation_logo.png, IssueDraft.swift) and fixed the CreateIssueSheet call mismatch so app build passes. Validation: swift test passed 268/268; xcodebuild -project Workstation.xcodeproj -scheme Workstation -configuration Debug build SUCCEEDED.
title: Recover agent launch when worktree already exists

- Pilih tab 'Defaults' di sidebar kiri

Konten panel Defaults:
1. Dropdown 'Default issue type' — pilih Task / Bug / Feature / Epic / Chore
2. Segmented priority picker (P0 Must, P1 Important, P2 High, P3 Medium, P4 Low)
3. Text editor 'Default close reason template' — template teks yang akan prefill saat menutup issue

Integrasi ke fitur lain:
- Create Issue Sheet sudah pakai defaultIssueType dan defaultPriority dari preferences
- Close Issue Sheet sudah pakai defaultCloseReasonTemplate dari preferences

Cara test manual:

2. Klik 'Settings' di sidebar kiri → pilih tab 'Defaults'

6. Tutup Settings, buka lagi → semua setting Defaults tetap tersimpan

description: Tambah 'Focus Mode' sebagai fitur first-class di Workstation. Terdiri dari tiga bagian: (1) FocusSession model — struct/class baru yang menyimpan issueID, startTime, pausedDuration, dan array of SessionInterval. Persist ke UserDefaults atau file sidecar supaya survive app restart. (2) Persistent focus strip di StatusBarView — saat issue di-focus, strip menampilkan: status dot, issue ID + judul (truncated), elapsed timer yang update tiap detik, tombol Pause/Resume, dan tombol unfocus (✕). Strip ini selalu visible di semua view selama ada active focus session. (3) Session log di IssueDetailView — section baru 'Time Spent' yang menampilkan total waktu kumulatif dari semua session untuk issue itu, breakdown per session (tanggal, durasi). (4) Trigger focus: klik 'Focus' button di issue card atau detail pane, atau otomatis saat issue di-claim. (5) Gentle reminder notification setelah 90 menit tanpa pause — 'Sudah 90 menit di issue ini, mau istirahat?'

description: Implementasi command palette global yang bisa dibuka dari mana saja dengan ⌘K (atau ⌘Shift+K supaya tidak konflik dengan Copilot yang sudah dihapus). Palette adalah floating sheet dengan fuzzy search input yang mencakup: (1) Issue search — ketik judul/ID, langsung navigate ke issue atau select di board. (2) Actions — 'Move to In Progress', 'Claim', 'Close', 'New Issue', 'Reload' — semua aksi board yang biasanya butuh klik. (3) Status filter shortcuts — 'Show only Blocked', 'Show In Progress', dll. (4) Recent issues — tanpa ketik apapun, langsung tampil 5 issue terakhir yang dibuka. UI: dark/light adaptive, rounded sheet di tengah layar, keyboard-navigable (arrow keys + Enter), dismiss dengan Escape. Tidak perlu mouse sama sekali.
notes: Implemented Command Palette (⌘⇧K) with fuzzy search. Features: (1) Issue search — fuzzy match by title/ID, select to navigate. (2) 3 quick actions — Reload, New Issue, Debug Panel. (3) 3 filter shortcuts — Human Review, Blocked, Clear Filters. (4) Recent issues shown by default (top 5 by updatedAt). (5) Keyboard navigation (↑↓, Enter, Escape). (6) Dark Craftboard style sheet centered with shadow. Also added statuses filter to FilterState for future extension. BUILD SUCCEEDED, 273/273 tests green.

description: Implementasi macOS native notifications (UNUserNotificationCenter) untuk membuat user aware terhadap perubahan penting tanpa harus aktif melihat app. Event yang trigger notifikasi: (1) Agent selesai running — 'Agent finished: Workstation-xxx moved to Review' dengan action button 'Open Issue'. (2) Issue berpindah status — khususnya ke In Review (butuh perhatian user) atau Done (bisa celebrate). (3) Blocked issue ter-unblock — 'Workstation-xxx is now unblocked, ready to work'. (4) Focus session reminder — 90 menit tanpa pause (dari Focus Mode). Implementasi: minta permission UNUserNotificationCenter saat pertama kali user enable. Notifikasi harus actionable — tap notifikasi buka app + navigate ke issue yang relevan. Settings panel untuk toggle masing-masing jenis notifikasi on/off. Hindari notification spam — cooldown 30 detik per issue untuk status changes.
notes:
Implementasi selesai. Build & 273 tests hijau.

FILES:
- Sources/BeadsContract/SmartNotificationSettings.swift — struct settings (Codable, Equatable, Sendable) dengan 4 toggle: agentCompletion, statusChange, unblocked, focusReminder. Cooldown default 30s, focus reminder default 90 menit.
- Sources/BeadsWorkspace/SmartNotificationManager.swift — @MainActor @Observable service. Permission via UNUserNotificationCenter.requestAuthorization. Status-diff detection dengan snapshot sebelum reload + compare setelah reload. Cooldown per-issue dengan lastNotificationTimes dict. Focus reminder sent once per session (focusReminderSentForID set).
- App/NotificationSettingsView.swift — sheet 380×480 dengan permission indicator (dot hijau/orange), 4 toggle rows, cooldown picker (15/30/60/120s).
- Sources/BeadsWorkspace/AppPreferences.swift — field 'notifications: SmartNotificationSettings' dengan backwards-compat decodeIfPresent.
- App/AppViewModel.swift — initNotificationManager() on first workspace sync, snapshotBeforeReload() + detectStatusChanges() setiap reloadIssues(), triggerFocusReminderIfNeeded() di tickFocusTimer(), sendAgentCompletionNotification() di updateAgentRunStatus saat .needsReview.
- App/BoardSidebarView.swift — Notifications button (bell icon).
- App/BoardView.swift — .sheet(isPresented: $appVM.isNotificationSettingsPresented) → NotificationSettingsView.

CATATAN: Blocker Workstation-1pc (FSEvents file watcher) masih in_progress dengan label human. Smart Notifications sudah bisa bekerja karena detection dilakukan di reloadIssues() yang dipanggil file watcher — ketika Workstation-1pc selesai, notifikasi otomatis lebih responsif tanpa perubahan tambahan.
title: Smart Notifications: status change & agent completion awareness

description: Floating input untuk bikin issue instant tanpa interrupt flow. Trigger: ⌘Shift+N dari mana saja di dalam app. UI: small popover atau bottom sheet — satu text field untuk judul, optional type selector (Task/Bug/Feature via Tab key), langsung submit dengan Enter. Issue masuk ke Backlog dengan priority default. Tidak perlu buka CreateIssueSheet yang full — itu tetap ada untuk pengisian lengkap. Fitur tambahan: (1) Jika ada teks di clipboard saat dibuka, pre-fill judul dari clipboard. (2) Setelah submit, tampilkan toast kecil 'Issue created: Workstation-xxx' dengan link untuk open detail kalau mau lengkapin. (3) Keyboard shortcut yang bisa dikonfigurasi di settings.
notes: Implemented Quick Capture (⌘⇧N) with: (1) Instant floating sheet triggered by ⌘⇧N. (2) Title input with clipboard pre-fill on open. (3) Type selector cycling Task→Bug→Feature→Epic→Chore via Tab key. (4) P2 priority default. (5) Issue created with bd, ID shown in toast. (6) Toast with issue link to navigate directly. (7) Auto-dismiss toast after 4s. BUILD SUCCEEDED, 273/273 tests green.

description: Ganti polling manual dengan FSEvents/DispatchSource untuk watch .beads/issues.jsonl secara real-time. Saat file berubah (ditulis oleh bd CLI atau agent), app otomatis reload issues tanpa perlu user klik ⌘R. Implementasi: buat BeadsFileWatcher service menggunakan DispatchSource.makeFileSystemObjectSource — watch directory .beads/ untuk event .write. Debounce 300ms supaya tidak flood reload saat bd menulis multiple kali dalam satu operasi. Integrate ke IssueStore: replace/supplement polling dengan watcher. Side effect positif: semua fitur yang depend on fresh data (Smart Notifications, Focus Mode reminder, board view) otomatis benefit tanpa perubahan tambahan. Ini blocker untuk Smart Notifications.
title: FSEvents file watcher: auto-detect issues.jsonl changes

description:
Summary
Simplify the assignee UX so choosing an AI executor becomes the main handoff action. When the user picks Claude, Codex, or another AI executor, the app should claim the issue and open the agent in a worktree automatically. Human assignees stay assignment-only.

Key changes
- Make AI executor assignee selection trigger a combined assign + run flow.
- Support the same behavior from all existing entry points, including issue card right-click menus, issue detail menus, and any assignee picker UI.
- Keep the visual assignee badges/icons unchanged.
- Keep worktree launch as the default path for AI executors.
- Preserve the manual/advanced launch path only as a secondary fallback, not the main flow.
- Keep Beads mutations explicit through `bd`, and terminal launch through the existing safe launcher.

Acceptance criteria
- Selecting Claude or Codex from assignee UI claims the issue and opens the agent terminal in a worktree.
- Right-click menus expose the same combined action as direct selection.
- Selecting a human assignee updates metadata only and does not launch Terminal.
- Existing prompt copy, agent run history, and console behavior still work.
- Existing dirty/worktree safety rules still apply.
- Assignee visuals stay the same.

Implementation notes
- Reuse the existing selected-agent and worktree launch plumbing where possible.
- Keep the new flow simple enough that the user does not need to think in two separate steps: assign, then run.
title: Assignee handoff: combine assign and launch for AI executors

acceptance_criteria:
- BulkActionPanel compiles again.
- IssueStore exposes the selection behavior expected by bulk actions, or BulkActionPanel is updated to the new API.

description:
BulkActionPanel no longer compiles because it expects selection APIs on IssueStore that are missing in the current tree.

Observed failures while building the worktree used for Local AI testing:
- IssueStore has no member selectedIssues
- IssueStore has no member toggleSelection
- IssueStore has no member selectedIssueIDs

This blocks app builds in the worktree and makes it hard to validate unrelated features. The fix should restore the selection contract or refactor the bulk action panel to use the current store API without breaking existing multi-select UX.

What needs to be done:
- Inspect the intended IssueStore selection model.
- Restore or replace the missing selection methods used by BulkActionPanel.
- Keep bulk action behavior consistent with the existing UI.
- Make sure the app builds again in the worktree.

Acceptance criteria:
- BulkActionPanel compiles again.
- IssueStore exposes the selection behavior expected by bulk actions, or BulkActionPanel is updated to the new API.
- App build succeeds in the worktree.
- Existing bulk selection UX still works.
notes:
Fixed. Root cause: BulkActionPanel was committed in cfdc302 expecting IssueStore selection APIs (selectedIssues, toggleSelection, selectedIssueIDs, hasMultiSelection) that never landed alongside it. Additionally DetailPaneMode.bulkAction was added to AppViewModel without IssueRightPane updating its switch, also breaking build.

Two commits on master:
- ce68038 fix: restore IssueStore selection APIs for BulkActionPanel (selectedIssueIDs, rangeAnchorID, toggleSelection, selectRange, selectedIssues, hasMultiSelection; selectIssue/clearSelection maintain multi-state; performReload prunes stale ids)
- 80d33e1 fix: handle bulkAction case in IssueRightPane (routes to BulkActionPanel; skip auto-reset to .issue while multi-selection active)

Verified: swift build ok, swift test 261/261 green, xcodebuild Debug succeeded. Also overlaid both files into worktree workstation-workstation-6tq and confirmed its app build succeeds. 6tq backups restored — its own working tree untouched. Bulk selection UX preserved (cmd-click toggle, shift-click range, esc clear, BulkActionPanel right-pane with Claim All / Mark Human Review / Close All / Clear).
title: Bulk actions: restore IssueStore selection APIs for BulkActionPanel

description:
Add explicit launch preflight and recovery states for worktree-based agent runs.

Why this exists:
Worktree runs need clearer feedback when setup, dirty-tree, or branch conflicts block launch.

What needs to be done:
- Detect and surface missing setup, dirty tree, existing worktree, and branch conflict states.
- Show a clear recovery path before launching Terminal.
- Keep launch routed through the existing safe launcher.
- Make the blocked state actionable instead of a dead end.

Acceptance criteria:

- User can retry validation or choose a recovery action.
- Successful launch still goes through the safe terminal path.
- No silent shell execution is added.
notes: Added worktree launch preflight in GitWorktreeService and AppViewModel. Launch now pauses on setup, dirty-tree confirmation, existing worktree, or branch conflict states and shows the recovery sheet. Successful launch still uses the safe terminal launcher. Added service coverage for clean, dirty, setup-missing, and conflict preflight cases.

description: Add an Agent Run Console panel/drawer for the selected AgentRunRecord. This is the local/simple version of an agent console. It should not run or stream the AI agent inside the app yet. The goal is to make each vibe coding session easier to control by showing selected issue, selected agent, generated prompt, run status, project path or worktree path, terminal command, quick actions for copying prompt and opening terminal, local notes, and next-step actions like mark needs review or accepted. This version should be purely local UI + stored AgentRunRecord data. It should not embed Claude/Codex. It should not stream terminal output. It should not require a pseudo-terminal. Suggested component names: AgentRunConsoleView, AgentRunHeaderView, AgentRunPromptPreviewView, AgentRunActionsView, AgentRunNotesView. Suggested UI layout: right-side drawer or detail panel. Header: issue ID, issue title, agent name, status badge, project/worktree path. Prompt section: generated prompt preview, copy prompt button, optional edit-before-copy textarea if already supported. Actions: Open Terminal, Copy Command, Mark Needs Review, Mark Accepted, Mark Failed, Mark Abandoned. Notes: local notes textarea, save notes to AgentRunRecord. Implementation notes: Reuse existing AgentRunHistory and AgentRunRecord model. If AgentRunRecord does not yet store notes, ensure notes can be persisted. When a run is created from Implement with Selected Agent, automatically open/show the Agent Run Console for that run. The console should work for both Claude Code Executor and Codex Code Executor. If the run uses a worktree, show the worktree path. If the run uses the main project folder, show the project path. The console should be read/write only for app-local metadata such as run status and notes. Do not mutate Beads issue status automatically from this console, except through existing explicit user actions if already available. Do not close Beads issues automatically. Do not run custom arbitrary shell commands silently.
notes:
Implemented Agent Run Console v1.

Changes:
- New AgentRunConsoleView (App/AgentRunConsoleView.swift) with sub-views: AgentRunHeaderView, AgentRunPromptPreviewView, AgentRunActionsView, AgentRunNotesView. Shows issue ID/title, agent name, status badge, project/worktree path, generated prompt, terminal command, status-action buttons (needsReview/accepted/failed/abandoned), and a notes editor with Save/Revert.
- AgentRunHistoryStore: added updateNotes(id:notes:), record(id:), latestRecord(forIssueID:). Notes-only updates preserve status and completedAt; whitespace-only notes are normalized to nil.
- AppViewModel: added activeConsoleRunID state, presentAgentRunConsole / presentLatestAgentRunConsole / dismissAgentRunConsole, updateAgentRunStatus, updateAgentRunNotes, and openTerminalForAgentRun (reuses existing TerminalLauncher). Launches via performAgentLaunch and beginWorktreeAgentLaunch now set activeConsoleRunID so the console opens automatically after Implement with Selected Agent / Run in Worktree.
- BoardView: presents the console as a sheet bound to activeConsoleRunID; only opens when a record exists.
- IssueDetailView: 'Run Console' button appears when the issue has at least one recorded run, opening the latest run.
- Tests: new AgentRunHistoryStoreTests for updateNotes and lookups. Full suite (219 tests) passes; xcodebuild app build also succeeds.

No embedded Claude/Codex API, no live streaming, no .beads file mutations. Status changes only affect the local AgentRunRecord.
title: Agent Run Console v1: local prompt and run control panel

description: Worktree preflight should not treat passive Beads export noise as a blocking git dirty state. When bd writes .beads/issues.jsonl or related export files, creating or launching an agent run in a worktree should still succeed as long as there are no real source or project file changes. Keep the existing bd-only mutation rule and preserve issue file watching/reload behavior.
title: Ignore Beads export noise in worktree runs

description:
Why: Action paling sering (claim, flag review, close, copy prompt) saat ini cuma ada di detail panel. Power user harus buka panel dulu sebelum bisa act. Context menu = 1 right-click + 1 pilih = 2 klik total, no panel needed.

What:
- Tambah .contextMenu modifier di IssueCardView (kanban) dan IssueListView row.
- Menu items: Claim (kalau status=open), Flag for Review (kalau status=in_progress), Close..., Copy Prompt, Copy Agent Command, Add Blocker..., Change Priority > submenu P0-P4, Change Assignee > submenu claude/codex/other/me.
- Item disabled kontekstual (Flag for Review tidak muncul untuk open/closed).
- Reuse AppViewModel.copyPrompt, presentCloseSheet, store.claim/requestHumanReview yang sudah ada.

Out of scope:
- Multi-select context menu (separate issue kalau perlu).
- Keyboard accelerator di menu item (terikat ke keyboard nav issue terpisah).

acceptance_criteria: (1) Drag card dari Ready ke In Progress otomatis claim+assignee=user. (2) Drop ke Done buka close sheet, cancel batal mutate. (3) Drop ke kolom sama-status = noop tanpa error. (4) Test KanbanBoardViewTests untuk drop handler logic. (5) Visual: card opacity drop ~0.5 saat drag, target border gold.
description:
Why: Transisi status (claim, flag review, close) saat ini tersembunyi di menu/sheet — butuh 2-3 klik. Drag-drop adalah gesture paling natural di kanban dan satu klik-drag bisa replace seluruh flow context menu untuk perpindahan kolom.

What:
- Drag card dari Ready ke In Progress → trigger 'bd update --claim'.
- Drag card dari In Progress ke Review → trigger 'bd update --add-label human'.
- Drag card ke Done → buka CloseIssueSheet (require reason).
- Drag ke Blocked → noop atau toast 'add blocker via picker' (Blocked column read-only secara semantik).
- Pakai SwiftUI .onDrag/.dropDestination di KanbanBoardView.swift.
- Drop tidak boleh trigger select/open-detail (state guard).
- Visual feedback: card semi-transparent saat di-drag, target column highlight border gold.

Out of scope:
- Drag-drop reorder dalam kolom yang sama (bd tidak punya konsep order).
- Drag dari/ke List view.
notes:
Implemented drag-and-drop antar kolom kanban.

Files:
- NEW Sources/BeadsContract/KanbanDropResolver.swift — pure resolver (KanbanDropAction enum + action(from:to:) function)
- NEW Tests/BeadsContractTests/KanbanDropResolverTests.swift — 12 cases covering full drop matrix
- App/KanbanBoardView.swift — .draggable(issue.id) per card dengan preview opacity 0.7; .dropDestination per kolom dengan hoverTargetColumn state + gold border overlay (2px, animasi 0.12s); handleDrop dispatches ke store mutations
- App/BoardView.swift — pass onRequestClose closure ke KanbanBoardView (presents CloseIssueSheet via appVM)

Drop matrix yang aktif:
- Ready/Backlog → InProgress = store.claim()
- InProgress → Review = store.requestHumanReview() (add label human)
- InProgress/Review → Done = onRequestClose() → CloseIssueSheet
- Sisanya noop (Done→x, Blocked→x, Ready→Done, dst)

Verifikasi:
- swift test: 183/183 hijau (baseline 170 → 183, +12 cases baru + +1 yang sudah ada di baseline)
- swift build: clean
- xcodegen generate: success (file baru ter-register)
- ./run-app build: BUILD SUCCEEDED

Manual smoke pending — please verify 5 path di plan: Ready→InProgress (claim), InProgress→Review (label human), InProgress→Done (sheet muncul, cancel = no mutation), Done→InProgress (noop), Ready→Done (noop). Visual: drag preview opacity 0.7, target column gold border saat hover. Click biasa tetap select card.

Out of scope (per plan): reverse transitions (butuh removeLabel service yg belum ada), reorder dalam kolom (bd tidak punya order), drag kanban↔list, toast saat noop.
title: Drag-and-drop card antar kolom kanban
